reviews.review_description:
The mood of this game brought to my mind the feeling I had when I used to play Tomb Raider Legend back in the day and also those Indiana Jones games from Lucas arts. But just one small stage. As it is in VR I enjoyed the sense of immersion and spend a lot of time just by staring into the wall, floor and object designs. Also the awesome lights and sound effects gives this game an excellent tomb raider atmosphere which is amazing. The puzzles were interesting and enjoyable too. I hope someday the developers could make more stages like this. And if they can add controller support. 

Graphics 5
Music 5
Sound fx 5
Animations 5
Puzzles 5
Length 2
Gameplay 4 (neck disconfort cause the gaze control).

This game has some nice game-play and graphics but there's one big problem. It only took me half an hour to finish the whole game! If they made at least 3 hours worth of play I would have been happy. As it stands I feel a bit ripped off that it was over so soon. $5 for half hour of entertainment is not a very good value proposition.

They went to all the trouble developing art assets and figuring out the game mechanics. That's probably 90% of the work right there. Once they have those figured out, spend an extra month of development time and give us a full 3 or 4 hours of game time.
Really enjoyable and immersion experience. Get lots of people to play through it to get your money's worth because it's over quickly :)
This fab game needs a full version please
I have an S7 Edge and when the image moved, it vibrates. Pretty unplayable like that. It's the only game that does this.

I enjoyed the "find and combine objects" type of puzzles in this game.  I jumped into the game just to check it out and ended up playing it all the way through.  It's a bit on the short side, it took me a little over a half hour to complete, but I bought it on sale for $3.34 so I would definitely say that it was worth it.
Perfect game, but too short

This is exactly the type of game I have been looking for in VR. I love puzzle/adventure games and that's exactly what this is. Very similar to old Sierra type, point and click adventures. Nice use of an inventory system. The graphics and sound design were done very well. While it's not free movement, it does have walking animations rather than teleporting once you choose a direction. I definitely prefer this over teleporting. The only issues I had with this title were the length and difficulty of the puzzles. This game is very short. I completed it in about 30 minutes, and that was taking my time. Also, the puzzles were a little easy. While it was a perfect start to the adventure, I think it would have been better if they progressively got a little harder.
Loved the simple puzzles and atmosphere. Excited to see your next work!
Like the title slow paced good game just not my cup of tea mind you I could drink a cup of tea while I was playing
Really like this game!  Having issues with continuing game and getting to the other side of lake of fire, not steps when you continue game.  Is this a glitch?

It is just one short chapter.  And it seems incomplete as well.  You collect coins and treasure, but you never use it.  Still, although it is very short, it is nice and enjoyable.  I feel this is more of a test for a future game.
...Please add some other content. Plus the graphic makes you feel like a dwarf
A fun little dungeon crawler. The graphics are satisfying and the sound was enjoyable. I'm glad I bought this one.
It's like being inside the Aztec Zone in the TV show  'The Crystal Maze'.

The game is neither very long nor hard, so I'm not sure it's worth its price. Still, I really enjoyed exploring the tomb. The graphics are pretty good, some nice details here and there, and generally a consistent look.

Wow. Off all the VR games, this one seems to have a special level of 3D. It also hurts the game with text being scrambled. My fear is the game is too short, but I haven't played much, just a few rooms. Be sure to look at the spider as you pass it. It looks so trippy!

reviews.review_title: One of the Best VR Adventures 2016
reviews.review_description: Love the Atmosphere. Friendly, mysterious, yet not scary, no jumpscares, just cartoonish nice exotic tomb-jungle-temple-feeling with enogh riddles for one Episode. Please Do more!
I had a blast playing this game! I love the mystery mixed with great graphics. I want more from this company! Some sci fi mystery content would be great!

I actually purchased this by mistake while looking for Temple Run. However in some respects it was a welcome purchase. I loved the ability to take your time and explore the puzzles and take in the detail of each room. Was beautiful to view the scenery. The method of movement by selecting links to each room worked well and I could stay in the game without feeling strained or dizzy. I would give this 5* if it was not so short. As it was about 20 mins to complete, and no replay value as you now know the solutions, the cost is not in proportion to the experience. It was more akin to a demo. 
If the game was much longer I'd thoroughly recommend it. But because it's so short I dont think it's worth the same as a full game. 
It's a shame as I was really enjoying it.
